name: Burgerliches Brauhaus Ravensburg - Lindau Aktiengesellschaft
summary: B√É¬ºrgerliches Brauhaus Ravensburg - Lindau Aktiengesellschaft engages in the administration and leasing of real estate properties. The company rents out its commercial administration and office buildings in Ravensburg, Germany. It also engages in the provision and lease of gaming machines, and amusement and entertainment machines, as well as operates catering establishments and gambling casinos. The company is headquartered in Lindau, Germany.
